// build log

Projects

Real-world builds spanning IoT, cloud, and front-end development.

01 /
IoT Paralysis Patient Healthcare Monitoring
Real-time monitoring system for paralysed patients using Arduino. Tracks heart rate, temperature, flex sensors and accelerometer — sends sound alerts and internet notifications for patient needs.
ArduinoIoTC/C++Sensors
02 /
Netflix Clone — HTML & CSS
Pixel-perfect Netflix UI recreation using semantic HTML and CSS only. Features responsive design adapting to all screen sizes with matching typography, layout and visual elements.
HTML5CSS3Responsive
03 /
Dynamic Website on GCP
Dynamic web application deployed on Google Cloud with Compute Engine, load-balanced VMs and BigQuery for large-scale data processing and analytics.
